en: But the LORD said to Moses, "Now you shall see what I will do to Pharaoh; for with a strong hand he will send them out, and with a strong hand he will drive them out of his land."
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“你現在必看見我要向法老行的事；因為我施展大能的手，他必讓他們離去；我施展大能的手，他必把他們從自己的地趕出去。”

en: God spoke to Moses and said to him, "I am the LORD.
zh: 神告訴摩西說：“我是耶和華。

en: I appeared to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob, as God Almighty, but by my name the LORD I did not make myself known to them.
zh: 我曾向亞伯拉罕、以撒、雅各顯現為全能的 神，至於我的名字‘耶和華’，他們是不認識的。

en: I also established my covenant with them to give them the land of Canaan, the land in which they lived as sojourners.
zh: 我不但與他們確立了我的約，要把迦南地，就是他們作客寄居之地賜給他們；

en: Moreover, I have heard the groaning of the people of Israel whom the Egyptians hold as slaves, and I have remembered my covenant.
zh: 而且我也聽見了以色列人因埃及人所加的奴役而發的哀聲，就記念我的約。

en: Say therefore to the people of Israel, 'I am the LORD, and I will bring you out from under the burdens of the Egyptians, and I will deliver you from slavery to them, and I will redeem you with an outstretched arm and with great acts of judgment.
zh: 所以，你要對以色列人說：‘我是耶和華，我要把你們從埃及人的重擔底下救出來；我要拯救你們脫離他們的奴役；我要用伸出來的膀臂，並藉著嚴厲的刑罰來救贖你們。

en: I will take you to be my people, and I will be your God, and you shall know that I am the LORD your God, who has brought you out from under the burdens of the Egyptians.
zh: 我要以你們作我的人民，我也要作你們的 神；你們要知道我是耶和華你們的 神，是把你們從埃及人的重擔底下救出來的。

en: I will bring you into the land that I swore to give to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob. I will give it to you for a possession. I am the LORD.'"
zh: 我舉手起誓要給亞伯拉罕、以撒、雅各的地，我必領你們進去；我也必把那地賜給你們作產業；我是耶和華。’”

en: Moses spoke thus to the people of Israel, but they did not listen to Moses, because of their broken spirit and harsh slavery.
zh: 摩西這樣告訴以色列人，只是他們因為心裡愁煩和苦工的緣故，就不肯聽摩西的話。

en: So the LORD said to Moses,
zh: 耶和華告訴摩西說：

en: "Go in, tell Pharaoh king of Egypt to let the people of Israel go out of his land."
zh: “你要告訴埃及王法老，叫他讓以色列人離開他的地。”

en: But Moses said to the LORD, "Behold, the people of Israel have not listened to me. How then shall Pharaoh listen to me, for I am of uncircumcised lips?"
zh: 摩西在耶和華面前說：“看哪，以色列人尚且不肯聽我的話，法老又怎會聽我的話呢？因為我是個拙口笨舌的人。”

en: But the LORD spoke to Moses and Aaron and gave them a charge about the people of Israel and about Pharaoh king of Egypt: to bring the people of Israel out of the land of Egypt.
zh: 耶和華吩咐摩西和亞倫，命令他們到以色列人和埃及王法老那裡去，把以色列人從埃及地領出來。

en: These are the heads of their fathers' houses: the sons of Reuben, the firstborn of Israel: Hanoch, Pallu, Hezron, and Carmi; these are the clans of Reuben.
zh: 他們各家族首領的名字記在下面：以色列的長子流本的兒子是哈諾、法路、希斯倫、迦米；這些是流本的各家族。

en: The sons of Simeon: Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jachin, Zohar, and Shaul, the son of a Canaanite woman; these are the clans of Simeon.
zh: 西緬的兒子是耶母利、雅憫、阿轄、雅斤、瑣轄和迦南女子的兒子掃羅；這些是西緬的各家族。

en: These are the names of the sons of Levi according to their generations: Gershon, Kohath, and Merari, the years of the life of Levi being 137 years.
zh: 利未眾子的名字按著他們的世代記在下面，就是革順、哥轄、米拉利。利未一生的歲數是一百三十七歲。

en: The sons of Gershon: Libni and Shimei, by their clans.
zh: 革順的兒子，按著他們的家族，是立尼、示每。

en: The sons of Kohath: Amram, Izhar, Hebron, and Uzziel, the years of the life of Kohath being 133 years.
zh: 哥轄的兒子是暗蘭、以斯哈、希伯倫、烏薛。哥轄一生的歲數是一百三十三歲。

en: The sons of Merari: Mahli and Mushi. These are the clans of the Levites according to their generations.
zh: 米拉利的兒子是抹利和母示。按著他們的世代，這些是利未的家族。

en: Amram took as his wife Jochebed his father's sister, and she bore him Aaron and Moses, the years of the life of Amram being 137 years.
zh: 暗蘭娶了自己的姑母約基別為妻；約基別給他生了亞倫和摩西；暗蘭一生的歲數是一百三十七歲。

en: The sons of Izhar: Korah, Nepheg, and Zichri.
zh: 以斯哈的兒子是可拉、尼斐、細基利。

en: The sons of Uzziel: Mishael, Elzaphan, and Sithri.
zh: 烏薛的兒子是米沙利、以利撒反、西提利。

en: Aaron took as his wife Elisheba, the daughter of Amminadab and the sister of Nahshon, and she bore him Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
zh: 亞倫娶了亞米拿達的女兒拿順的妹妹以利沙巴作妻子；她給亞倫生了拿答、亞比戶、以利亞撒、以他瑪。

en: The sons of Korah: Assir, Elkanah, and Abiasaph; these are the clans of the Korahites.
zh: 可拉的兒子是亞惜、以利加拿、亞比亞撒；這些是可拉的各家族。

en: Eleazar, Aaron's son, took as his wife one of the daughters of Putiel, and she bore him Phinehas. These are the heads of the fathers' houses of the Levites by their clans.
zh: 亞倫的兒子以利亞撒娶了普鐵的一個女兒為妻；她給以利亞撒生了非尼哈。按照他們的家族，這些就是利未人的各首領。

en: These are the Aaron and Moses to whom the LORD said: "Bring out the people of Israel from the land of Egypt by their hosts."
zh: 這亞倫和摩西，耶和華曾經對他們說過：“你們要按著他們的軍隊，把以色列人從埃及地領出來。”

en: It was they who spoke to Pharaoh king of Egypt about bringing out the people of Israel from Egypt, this Moses and this Aaron.
zh: 那對埃及王法老說要把以色列人從埃及領出來的，就是這摩西和亞倫。

en: On the day when the LORD spoke to Moses in the land of Egypt,
zh: 耶和華在埃及地對摩西說話的日子，

en: the LORD said to Moses, "I am the LORD; tell Pharaoh king of Egypt all that I say to you."
zh: 耶和華告訴摩西說：“我是耶和華，你要把我對你所說的一切話都告訴埃及王法老。”

en: But Moses said to the LORD, "Behold, I am of uncircumcised lips. How will Pharaoh listen to me?"
zh: 摩西在耶和華面前說：“你看，我是個拙口笨舌的人，法老怎肯聽我呢？”
